title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Walker Chandiok - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Walker Chandiok - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Walker Chandiok is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Aurangabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Walker Chandiok:
Walker Chandiok is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walker Chandiok!
